generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted rotary encoder attached to the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the first vertical axis, providing motor shaft angular position r_M."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gear transmission of the first axis, providing gearbox output angular position r_G."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hall‑effect current sensor measuring the motor phase current I_M of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor encoder position data (r_M) streamed via MQTT from the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped gearbox encoder position data (r_G) streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor current measurement I_M streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data (measured & derived)
instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft angular position trace r_M collected as time‑stamped series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox angular position trace r_G collected as time‑stamped series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor phase current I_M trace collected as time‑stamped series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ calculated from I_M and motor parameters, provided as time‑stamped series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkTool, EnablerDashboard
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity ω obtained by differentiating r_M, provided as time‑stamped series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkTool, EnablerDashboard
]

// C10: Models
instance EngineeringAxisSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing the mechanical and electrical structure of the first vertical axis, motor, gear wheels and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerAssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SimulinkFrictionFreeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink simulation model of the axis without friction, used as baseline for identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb and viscous friction for the axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EnablerMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker (e.g., Mosquitto) used to stream live measurement data from the robot controller to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceRealTimeVisualization, ServiceSimulatedVsMeasuredComparison
]

instance EnablerSimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing the friction models and processing data traces."
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceContinuousFrictionIdentification, ServiceSimulatedVsMeasuredComparison, ServiceUpdatedFrictionParameterGeneration
]

instance EnablerDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing real‑time measurements, model comparisons and friction insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceRealTimeVisualization
]

instance EnablerAssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) providing standardized metadata for the first axis asset."
    DTDFVocab:enables ServiceUpdatedFrictionParameterGeneration
]

// C6: Services
instance ServiceRealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data in a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionLoss, InsightModelPerformance
]

instance ServiceContinuousFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from live data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionUpdateControlAlgorithm, InsightFrictionLoss
]

instance ServiceSimulatedVsMeasuredComparison : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated traces against measured data to assess model performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightModelPerformance
]

instance ServiceUpdatedFrictionParameterGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of updated friction model parameters and automatic upload to the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionUpdateControlAlgorithm
]

// C17: Insights
instance InsightFrictionLoss : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into friction loss magnitude and its impact on motion accuracy."
]

instance InsightModelPerformance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the performance of the selected friction model based on simulation‑measurement deviation."
]

// C17: Actions
instance ActionUpdateControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of robot control algorithm with newly identified friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time / online processing of incoming sensor streams, enabling continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of the asset (first axis), purpose (friction derivation), sources (sensors and MQTT streams), processing components (simulation models), data traces, and a visualization dashboard that together enable traceability from raw measurements to friction parameter updates."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied in the operational stage of the robot to monitor and improve motion accuracy; it uses engineering models created during design and operational data collected at run‑time."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point to its originating source and processing model; continuous comparison of simulated friction‑free behavior with measured data to detect wear‑induced changes; use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) models to improve model fidelity over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot controller to the digital shadow over the MQTT protocol; the digital shadow consumes these MQTT streams for processing and visualization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation uses Asset Administration Shells (AAS), which follow Industry 4.0 standardization guidelines, and SysML, an established systems engineering modeling standard."
]
